{"step_by_step_thinking": "Option A is correct as fomepizole is indeed a competitive inhibitor of alcohol dehydrogenase, not aldehyde dehydrogenase. Option B is incorrect because the minimum lethal dose of methanol is approximately 1 g/kg body weight, not 1.25 ml/kg. Option C is correct as formic acid is the main toxic metabolite of methanol.
